{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603240042318D7A176A7484F3ECB3C3"}"},"total":1565},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"6933450901856944136","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"查案部分真的写得非常精彩，一个案子接着一个案子，超级爽！但一到主线剧情就一般般了，不过也算是环环相扣，挖的坑基本都填上了，非常棒！最意难平的就是女主了，当了90%篇章的女主，结果到了完本阶段，竟然让女二上了位！看了10多年小说了，最惨女主实至名归","text_exts":[{"e":69,"s":66,"text":"意难平","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%84%8F%E9%9A%BE%E5%B9%B3&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774284151F3ECB3C3%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%226933450901856944136%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%226845174781491285005%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%84%8F%E9%9A%BE%E5%B9%B3%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1614319841,"group_id":"6845174781491285005","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N70H4B6E/xxnLQEiUNQjGdA=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/2f884f6c88bb4ede891f45a6cdffa242~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776876910&x-signature=7nnkqE28%2F2kLG3rPVOhz8fomVBE%3D","user_id":"100007317684","user_name":"死肥宅魔王"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"100007317684","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1642041343,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","sma a":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.32773197e+08"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603240042318D7A176A7484F3ECB3C3"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读37小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":4,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":132772,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":2143},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"6978877735280165644","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书写出了一个不错的故事。
虽有很多一家之言，但行文不避主见，可以说是作者的用心之笔。
架构完整，能看出字里行间一些对大师们的致敬，说明作者在吸取营养时很认真，输出营养时也比较谨慎。
不媚俗，在人物塑造上敢露锋芒，作为网文已属佳作～
不过尚未圆融，期待下一部！！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1624896604,"group_id":"6845174781491285005","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"每天写个两千字练练手","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+79llHjMvBXubZCdQbDWno=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776877005&x-signature=F7rwZ9C6HX8CXHTnqUkNbe1L%2B0Q%3D","user_id":"369886792778061","user_name":"幽玄之魂"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"369886792778061","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6845174781491285005","book_info":{"abstract":"这是一部轻松的推理探案小说，讲述了一个默默无闻的街道小片警穿越到盛唐，然后一不小心就成了国民神探的故事。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-images/745be445e11fd1cee8c131f283889dad","author":"虞姬","author_id":"","book_id":"6845174781491285005","book_name":"长安街探案","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202028","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"9638人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":751,"name":"悬疑灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=751&name=悬疑灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":61,"name":"推理","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=61&name=推理&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":73,"name":"大唐","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=73&name=大唐&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":506,"name":"神探","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=506&name=神探&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"68461939542122
